# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# <auto-generated>
#
#     This code was generated.
#
#     - To turn off auto-generation set:
#
#         [TestForgejoActions (AutoGenerate = false)]
#
#     - To trigger manual generation invoke:
#
#         gruke --generate-configuration ForgejoActions_test --host ForgejoActions
#
# </auto-generated>
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: test

on: [push, pull_request]

concurrency:
  group: ${{ forgejo.workflow }} @ ${{ forgejo.event.pull_request.head.label || forgejo.head_ref || forgejo.run_id }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  'Run: Test (codeberg-tiny)':
    name: 'Run: Test (codeberg-tiny)'
    runs-on: codeberg-tiny
    timeout-minutes: 2
    steps:
      - uses: https://data.forgejo.org/actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Cache: .nuke/temp, ~/.nuget/packages'
        uses: https://data.forgejo.org/actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: |
            .nuke/temp
            ~/.nuget/packages
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/global.json', '**/*.csproj', '**/Directory.Packages.props') }}
      - name: 'Run: Test'
        run: ./build.cmd Test
        env:
          ApiKey: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}
      - name: 'Publish: src'
        uses: https://data.forgejo.org/forgejo/upload-artifact@v5
        with:
          name: src
          path: src
      - name: 'Publish: test-results'
        uses: https://data.forgejo.org/forgejo/upload-artifact@v5
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: output/test-results
      - name: 'Publish: coverage-report.zip'
        uses: https://data.forgejo.org/forgejo/upload-artifact@v5
        with:
          name: coverage-report.zip
          path: output/coverage-report.zip
  'Run: Test (codeberg-small-lazy)':
    name: 'Run: Test (codeberg-small-lazy)'
    runs-on: codeberg-small-lazy
    timeout-minutes: 5
    steps:
      - uses: https://data.forgejo.org/actions/checkout@v6
      - name: 'Cache: .nuke/temp, ~/.nuget/packages'
        uses: https://data.forgejo.org/actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: |
            .nuke/temp
            ~/.nuget/packages
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/global.json', '**/*.csproj', '**/Directory.Packages.props') }}
      - name: 'Run: Test'
        run: ./build.cmd Test
        env:
          ApiKey: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}
      - name: 'Publish: src'
        uses: https://data.forgejo.org/forgejo/upload-artifact@v5
        with:
          name: src
          path: src
      - name: 'Publish: test-results'
        uses: https://data.forgejo.org/forgejo/upload-artifact@v5
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: output/test-results
      - name: 'Publish: coverage-report.zip'
        uses: https://data.forgejo.org/forgejo/upload-artifact@v5
        with:
          name: coverage-report.zip
          path: output/coverage-report.zip
